attr.title: Dungeon in a Bottle
attr.desc: Dungeon in a Bottle is a precision platformer about choosing the right kind of jump. The acrobatic thief, Reya, has gotten himself trapped in a magic bottle, and now he must use every jump at his disposal to escape the treacherous dungeon within! Hopefully he'll grab some treasure while he's at it.
attr.desc_md:
Dungeon in a Bottle is a precision platformer about choosing the right kind of jump. The acrobatic thief, Reya, has gotten himself trapped in a magic bottle, and now he must use every jump at his disposal to escape the treacherous dungeon within! Hopefully he'll grab some treasure while he's at it.

**Note: Game is tested with the Steam version only!**
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam. Copy diab.exe to ports/dungeoninabottle.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2128300/Dungeon_in_a_Bottle/). Copy diab.exe to ports/dungeoninabottle.
